headline: U.S. Bancorp (USB) Stock Looks Below Fair Value On Earnings And Returns
summary: U.S. Bancorp’s share price has climbed strongly over the past three years, yet both the Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate and the market multiple checks still point to the stock trading at a discount to what its cash flows and earnings might justify. U.S. Bancorp has returned 110.3% over the past three years, which puts fresh scrutiny on whether the current valuation still leaves room for further upside. The expansion into higher margin fee businesses, including the BTIG acquisition,...
